info.title: The Trade Desk API
info.description: The Trade Desk programmatic advertising platform API. Manage advertisers, campaigns, ad groups, creatives, audiences, bid lists, contracts, CRM data, and more.

post.description: Authenticates with The Trade Desk and returns a bearer token for subsequent API calls.

BearerAuth.description: Obtain a token via POST /authentication, then pass it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

TotalFilteredCount.description: Total number of results matching the filter

PartnerId.description: The partner ID under which to create this advertiser
The partner ID to query advertisers for

SearchTerms.description: Search keywords to filter by advertiser name

CampaignId.description: The ID of the campaign to clone

CampaignName.description: Name for the cloned campaign (defaults to original name with suffix)

StartDate.description: New start date for the cloned campaign

EndDate.description: New end date for the cloned campaign

FrequencyCap.description: Maximum number of impressions per user

FrequencyPeriodInMinutes.description: Time period in minutes for the frequency cap

AdGroupCategory.description: The channel type for this ad group

CampaignId.description: Optional campaign ID to narrow results

IsEnabled.description: Set to true to enable, false to disable

SiteListFallthrough.description: Whether to allow impressions from sites not on any list

AudienceIds.description: List of audience IDs to target

Exclude.description: List of audience IDs to exclude

Tag.description: Creative ad tag or HTML content

RecencyInMinutes.description: How recently users were added to the audience

EstimatedSize.description: Estimated number of users in the audience

EntryValue.description: The domain, app, deal ID, or IP to include/exclude

BidLists.description: Array of bid lists to create in batch

PiiType.description: Type of PII data in this segment

MatchRate.description: Percentage of uploaded records that matched

Data.description: Array of hashed PII values to add to the segment

Action.description: Whether to add, remove, or replace records

DataElementIds.description: IDs of data elements in this group

EntityType.description: Type of entity this activity relates to

tags.name: BidLists
tags.description: Manage bid lists for supply targeting
